text:
There was once a curious monkey who lived in a monkey tree monkey house. But one day, his house was knocked down by a playful elephant. Of course, our little monkey decided to climb up into themonkey treehouse hanging branch by branch. That's when he discovered his love for acrobatics – you couldn monkey do cartwheels!

You'll probably want to hear more. I could tell you stories all day about monkey adventures. We've got the story of Monkey the orangutan, who climbed up a tree to try to swing outside to eat some bananas. With a mighty shake of his head, he flew out into the jungle canopy.

There's also old Whitey the whale, but that's too big of a story for here. You could tell me about Wobbles the squirrel who collects these shiny shiny shiny seeds. Every time he sees one, he forgets where he put it. Eventually he finds it again. I love stories. Can you invent one?<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|>
